channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump administration has separated dozens of children from their parents for a second time, AP finds
item.description: An Associated Press investigation reveals that dozens of children who were separated under the first Trump administration have been re-separated, despite a judge’s order to reunite them.

item.title: Presidential museum showcases political and personal sides of Obama with sprawling community campus
Lebanese Americans open their wallets and hearts as war rages back home
